scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names web,worker "npm run dev --workspace @software-builder/web" "npm run dev --workspace @software-builder/worker"
scripts.db:migrate: npm run build --workspace @software-builder/database && npm run db:migrate --workspace @software-builder/database
scripts.db:reset: npm run build --workspace @software-builder/database && npm run db:reset --workspace @software-builder/database
scripts.db:seed: npm run build --workspace @software-builder/database && npm run db:seed --workspace @software-builder/database
scripts.db:provision-runtime: npm run build --workspace @software-builder/database && npm run db:provision-runtime --workspace @software-builder/database
